# pexip_infinity_media_library_playlist (Resource)

Manages a media library playlist configuration with the Infinity service. Media library playlists organize media entries for sequential or randomized playback in conferences.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "pexip_infinity_media_library_playlist" "example" {
  name        = "Welcome Playlist"
  description = "Playlist for welcome messages"
}
```


<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the media library playlist. Maximum length: 1024 characters.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the media library playlist. Maximum length: 1024 characters.
- `loop` (Boolean) If enabled, for a given call the whole playlist is repeated until the user disconnects themselves or until the call is terminated programmatically via the management API.
- `playlist_entries` (Set of String) List of media library entry URIs that make up this playlist.
- `shuffle` (Boolean) If enabled, the playlist is shuffled so that all media items are played in a random order (media items’ specified positions are not used).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource URI for the media library playlist
- `resource_id` (Number) The resource integer identifier for the media library playlist
